package.name: robot_script_server
package.description:
Agent-host scripted action server. An LLM (or any MCP client) can call register_script via the MCP server and this node spins up a /scripts_<session>/<name> action server that the orchestrator discovers like any hardware proxy.
Critically: agent-authored code runs on the agent's machine, never on the orchestrator. From DDS' perspective an agent-hosted skill is indistinguishable from a Liconic action; from a security perspective the LLM cannot run code on the lab control PC at all.
Phase 5 ships the bt_xml dispatcher (scripts are stored BT XML, executed by round-tripping through /skill_server/execute_behavior_tree). action_sequence and python_callable dispatchers are deferred behind --allow-python-scripts gating.
